With the might of thy power and thy excellent coding prowess, canst thou write a function that finds and fixes memory leaks, even in the dead of night, when everyone else is sound asleep? And with that same technical expertise, canst thou also provide the lyrics to a haiku that you composed earlier at 2:00 am this morning when you were experimenting with that very function?
